projectName: Portfolio - Projects Minimalist Hover Showcase Revamp
description: Scope-pivot epic focused on removing project filters, simplifying the UI to a minimalist aesthetic, introducing cyber-futuristic hover reveals with glitch effects, and using click-through project cards for deeper viewing experiences.

owner.projectName: Portfolio - Projects Minimalist Hover Showcase Revamp
owner.description: Scope-pivot epic focused on removing project filters, simplifying the UI to a minimalist aesthetic, introducing cyber-futuristic hover reveals with glitch effects, and using click-through project cards for deeper viewing experiences.

reason: Remove all filter/search/sort controls from the Projects section
Shift visual direction toward minimalist presentation
Replace click-to-open detail modal behavior with hover-first detail reveal
Make full project cards click through to a dedicated viewing link

inScope: Remove project filters/search/sort UI and related logic
Minimalist projects layout with stronger visual hierarchy
Cyber-futuristic hover effects with controlled glitch styling
Hover media preview (image/video) without requiring extra clicks
Card click-through navigation to project-specific detail links
Accessibility, reduced-motion fallback, and keyboard parity
Performance optimization for hover media and animations
Tests, docs, and progress tracking alignment
outOfScope: Creating new Next.js routes for project details
Reintroducing filter chips, search bar, or sort dropdowns
Expanding scope into unrelated sections (Hero, About, Certifications, Gallery)

architecture: Projects section follows a hover-first, click-through model (no project details modal)
No additional routes for project details inside this repo
Use existing Tailwind token classes for light/dark compatibility
Use data from portfolio-resources/data/projects.json as source of truth
Keep existing global modal system for resume/experience/booking unaffected
qualityGates: No accessibility regressions for keyboard-only users

existingFoundation.projectSection: src/components/sections/ProjectsSection.tsx currently includes discovery controls and hover/click interactions
existingFoundation.projectModal: src/components/ui/ProjectDetailModal.tsx currently handles click-to-open modal detail
existingFoundation.types: src/types/index.ts -> Project interface and related metadata types
existingFoundation.stylingAndMotion: Tailwind + Framer Motion patterns already used across sections

legacyCompletedCycle.note: Previous cycle is preserved in git history and progress.txt; v2.0.0 is the active direction.

successMetrics.ux: Projects section shows no filter/search/sort controls and feels minimalist at first glance
successMetrics.interaction: Hovering a card reveals enhanced cyber-futuristic details with glitch styling in under 150ms
successMetrics.navigation: Clicking a project card opens its specified detail link (detailURL/liveURL/repositoryURL fallback)
successMetrics.a11y: Keyboard users can focus cards and access the same key information available on hover
successMetrics.performance: Hover effects and media previews remain smooth without noticeable layout shifts
successMetrics.quality: Lint/build/test gates pass with zero failures
successMetrics.maintainability: PRD and progress documentation reflect the v2 pivot clearly

stories.title: Remove Filters and Discovery Controls
acceptanceCriteria: Remove search input, category chips, tag filter dropdown, and sort dropdown from ProjectsSection
Remove filter-state hooks and derived filtering/sorting code paths
Keep section title/count and minimal list flow
Retain View all/Show less only if still required by minimalist UX

technicalNotes.risk: Residual references to removed filter state causing dead code

stories.title: Project Click-Through Link Contract
acceptanceCriteria: Add explicit detailURL support in project data model
Define click-through priority: detailURL > liveURL > repositoryURL
Ensure entire project card is clickable and keyboard activatable
Keep secure external-link behavior (noopener/noreferrer)

technicalNotes.note: Clicking card should replace modal-detail behavior

stories.title: Minimalist Projects Visual Redesign
acceptanceCriteria: Simplify card chrome and spacing to a cleaner minimalist look
Reduce tag clutter while preserving key stack signals
Improve typography hierarchy for title, year, and short summary
Maintain visual consistency with dark/light theme tokens

technicalNotes.reference: Target aligns with attached screenshots and user direction

stories.title: Cyber-Futuristic Hover Reveal with Glitch Effects
acceptanceCriteria: On hover/focus, reveal enhanced project details without requiring click
Apply controlled glitch/cyber styling (scanline/noise/chromatic offset) without harming readability
Ensure animation timing is smooth and non-jittery
Provide reduced-motion fallback that preserves information clarity

technicalNotes.motion: Use Framer Motion with guardrails for accessibility

stories.title: Hover Media Preview (Image/Video) without Modal
acceptanceCriteria: Support optional hover media preview using image/video fields from project data
Play video previews muted and looped when available; fallback to static image
Do not require modal open for media preview
Keep mobile fallback behavior predictable when hover is unavailable

stories.title: Remove Project Detail Modal Flow
acceptanceCriteria: Remove project-detail modal trigger path from ProjectsSection
Remove project modal registration/state from ModalProvider if no longer needed
Delete or archive project modal component/tests when obsolete
Preserve resume/experience/booking modal functionality

technicalNotes.risk: Breaking existing modal consumers if shared types are changed incorrectly

stories.title: Accessibility and Keyboard-First Parity
acceptanceCriteria: Focus state mirrors hover reveal of key details
Enter/Space activation opens the card's target link consistently
ARIA labels/descriptions remain accurate for links and media preview
Hover-only information is not hidden from keyboard users

stories.title: Performance Hardening for Hover Effects and Media
acceptanceCriteria: Prevent layout shift during hover transitions
Lazy-load heavier media previews and avoid eager decode spikes
Keep interactions smooth on mobile and mid-range devices
Use memoization and efficient rendering paths where needed

technicalNotes.approach: Progressive enhancement and conservative animation costs

stories.title: Testing Expansion for No-Filter Hover-First UX
acceptanceCriteria: Add tests asserting filter/search/sort controls are absent
Add tests for hover/focus reveal behaviors and click-through navigation
Update/remove obsolete modal-detail tests
Ensure related suites pass in CI

stories.title: Documentation, Progress Log, and Release Alignment
acceptanceCriteria: Update .github/copilot-instructions.md with the no-filter minimalist projects direction
Record pivot and per-story progress in progress.txt
Keep no-push autocommit policy explicit
Ensure all commits reference story IDs where practical

technicalNotes.note: This story closes the v2.0.0 delivery loop

dependencies.title: Documentation, Progress Log, and Release Alignment
acceptanceCriteria: Update .github/copilot-instructions.md with the no-filter minimalist projects direction
